name: CATO CORP
summary: The Cato Corporation, founded in 1946, operates 1,069 fashion specialty stores across 31 states under brands including Cato, Cato Fashions, Cato Plus, Its Fashion, Its Fashion Metro, Versona, and Cache. The company offers apparel and accessories—including sportswear, dresses, shoes, jewelry, and handbags—at everyday low prices targeting fashion and value-conscious customers. It also operates e-commerce websites and provides proprietary credit card and layaway programs. Credit and layaway sales represented 6% of retail sales in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Cato / Cato Fashions / Cato Plus
products.description: Fashion apparel and accessories in junior/missy and plus sizes at everyday low prices.

products.name: Its Fashion / Its Fashion Metro
products.description: Trendy family fashion at everyday low prices.

products.name: Versona
products.description: Fashion apparel, jewelry, and accessories at exceptional everyday values.

products.name: Cache
products.description: Elevated fashion apparel and accessories sold as shop-within-Versona stores and e-commerce.

products.name: Proprietary Credit Card
products.description: Company-issued credit card to facilitate customer purchases; accounted for 6% of retail sales with layaway.

products.name: Layaway Plan
products.description: Company-offered layaway program to make merchandise purchases more convenient for customers.
